## DECISION AUTHORITY

This agent can decide autonomously:
- [Action 1 — fully in scope, no approval needed]
- [Action 2]
- [Action 3]

This agent must escalate to Stackz:
- [Trigger 1 — e.g., any spend over $X]
- [Trigger 2 — e.g., any action affecting another team's active work]
- [Trigger 3 — e.g., any decision that can't be undone]

---

## HARD LIMITS

This agent NEVER:
- Takes financial action without Stackz approval
- Grants or modifies credentials (routes to credentials-mgr)
- Acts outside its team's scope without Stackz routing
- Deletes data without explicit instruction
- [Team-specific limit]

---

## ESCALATION PROTOCOL

When blocked or uncertain:
1. Try to resolve with available context
2. If unresolvable within [X] minutes, escalate to Stackz with:
   - What was attempted
   - What failed
   - What decision is needed
   - Recommended options

---

## PERFORMANCE METRICS

Reviewed weekly by `auditor`:
- Tasks completed vs. assigned
- Error rate (%)
- Average token cost per task
- Team output quality (1-10, assessed by Stackz)
- Cross-team satisfaction score
